name: Meeting Scheduler Automation
description: Automates meeting scheduling with Calendly, sends confirmations, creates calendar events, and notifies team via Slack and CRM logging.

parameters.content:
## Meeting Scheduler
**Flow:**
1. Calendly webhook fires on `invitee.created`
2. Parses invitee + event details
3. Creates a Google Calendar event (in parallel with Slack notification)
4. Sends a confirmation email with a real calendar link (Google Calendar's `htmlLink` field, not a placeholder)
5. Logs/upserts the invitee in Salesforce

**Setup required:** Calendly webhook subscription, Google Calendar OAuth2, SendGrid, Slack, Salesforce credentials.

parameters.subject: ✅ Meeting Confirmed: {{ $('Parse Meeting Data').item.json.eventType }}
parameters.html:
Hi {{ $('Parse Meeting Data').item.json.inviteeName }},

Your meeting is confirmed!

Event: {{ $('Parse Meeting Data').item.json.eventType }}
Date: {{ new Date($('Parse Meeting Data').item.json.startTime).toLocaleDateString() }}
Time: {{ new Date($('Parse Meeting Data').item.json.startTime).toLocaleTimeString() }} - {{ new Date($('Parse Meeting Data').item.json.endTime).toLocaleTimeString() }}
Location: {{ $('Parse Meeting Data').item.json.location }}

Add to your calendar: Click here

parameters.text: ⚠️ Failed to parse a Calendly webhook payload. Check the execution log — a meeting may not have been scheduled correctly.
